ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Development, Production) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in the commit */,
  "commit_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch in which the commit was made */,
  "file_changes" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of files changed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the developer joined the organization */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the developer was active on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the developer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor worked on */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who contributed to the project */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, testing) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Brief description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the release belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was made */,
  "release_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in the release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the release */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the release */,
  "release_tag" TEXT /* Tag or identifier for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_releases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
